ogTitle: Geelong West vs Gelantipy: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Geelong West and Gelantipy.
heading: Geelong West vs Gelantipy — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Geelong West, Victoria and Gelantipy, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gelantipy has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Geelong West (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Geelong West or Gelantipy safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Geelong West has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Gelantipy scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Geelong West scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Gelantipy scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Geelong West or Gelantipy?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gelantipy has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
